name: react-debug
description: Use this skill when debugging React, Next.js, or frontend UI issues. Trigger for rendering bugs, hydration mismatches, broken state updates, hook issues, infinite re-renders, Tailwind/CSS problems, client/server component issues, event handling bugs, routing issues, performance bottlenecks, animation glitches, layout breakage, or build/runtime frontend errors. Use especially when users mention React errors, console warnings, unexpected UI behavior, visual inconsistencies, stale state, failed interactions, or broken frontend logic. Focus on root-cause analysis and minimal targeted fixes instead of rewriting large sections of the application.
